svg.title: 76% of AI agent tool calls have zero deterministic guards
svg.desc: Bar chart of four open-source AI agent repositories scanned with diplomat-agent: PraisonAI (89% unguarded), CrewAI (78%), Skyvern (76%), Dify (75%). Aggregate across 16 repos: 76% of tool calls with real-world side effects had no guards.
